import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut current = ""
  mut has_digit = false
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        if has_digit
          match string.parse_int(current)
          when Some(v)
            result = list.push(result, v)
          when None
            ()
          end
          current = ""
          has_digit = false
        end
      else
        current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
        has_digit = true
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if has_digit
    match string.parse_int(current)
    when Some(v)
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

fn remove_one(_ xs: List<Int>, _ target: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut out: List<Int> = []
  mut removed = false
  let n = list.len(xs)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match list.get(xs, i)
    when Some(v)
      if not removed and v == target
        removed = true
      else
        out = list.push(out, v)
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  out
end

fn sort_list(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut remaining = xs
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  while list.len(remaining) > 0
    match list.min(remaining)
    when Some(m)
      result = list.push(result, m)
      remaining = remove_one(remaining, m)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

fn format_list(_ xs: List<Int>) -> String
  mut out = ""
  mut first = true
  for v in xs
    if first
      out = "#{v}"
      first = false
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
  end
  out
end

match io.read_line()
when Some(line)
  let nums = parse_ints(line)
  let sorted = sort_list(nums)
  println(format_list(sorted))
when None
  println("")
end
